summary: Visor de Actualización bug fix verified successfully. The fix for construcciones not being saved during batch download (batch > 0) is working correctly. All 3361 geometrías and 6912 construcciones are loading properly. Counters display correctly (Total: 3225, Pendientes: 3220, Visitados: 2, Actualizados: 3).

minor.issue: Returns 404 when no ortofoto is uploaded - expected behavior but could return empty object instead

issues: IndexedDB timeout warnings appear in console during initial load - does not affect functionality but causes delay

critical_code_review_comments: The fix at lines 640-644 in VisorActualizacion.js correctly captures construcciones when batch === 0
Backend endpoint correctly returns construcciones only with offset=0 (6912 construcciones)
Progressive download works correctly with batch size of 500
context_for_next_testing_agent: Visor de Actualización is working correctly. The bug fix for construcciones not appearing during batch download has been verified. Project ID: 32ba040f-ed50-45e2-a115-22ab3a351423. Total geometrías: 3361, Total construcciones: 6912, Total predios R1/R2: 3225.

features_tested.visor_navigation: PASSED - Navigation from Proyectos list to Visor works correctly
features_tested.geometrias_loading: PASSED - 3361 geometrías loaded and displayed on map
features_tested.construcciones_loading: PASSED - 6912 construcciones loaded and displayed in RED on map (BUG FIX VERIFIED)
features_tested.rural_predios: PASSED - Rural predios displayed in GREEN
features_tested.urban_predios: PASSED - Urban predios displayed in BLUE
features_tested.offline_cache: PASSED - Geometrías saved for offline use

api_verification.predios: PASSED - Returns 3225 predios with R1/R2 data

bug_fix_verification.issue: Construcciones del GDB no aparecían en el mapa durante descarga por lotes
bug_fix_verification.root_cause: Construcciones solo se enviaban con offset=0, pero el frontend no las capturaba cuando batch > 0
bug_fix_verification.fix_description: Added condition to capture construcciones when batch === 0
bug_fix_verification.verification: Console log shows '[Visor] Construcciones cargadas: 6912' - FIX WORKING
